subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install the dependencies specified in your Gemfile

options.name: --binstubs
options.description: Generate bin stubs for bundled gems to ./bin

options.name: --clean
options.description: Run bundle clean automatically after install

options.name: --deployment
options.description: Install using defaults tuned for deployment environments

options.name: --gemfile
options.description: Use the specified gemfile instead of Gemfile

options.name: --path
options.description: Specify a different path than the system default ($BUNDLE_PATH or $GEM_HOME).

options.name: --without
options.description: Exclude gems that are part of the specified named group.

options.name: --with
options.description: Include gems that are part of the specified named group.

options.name: --no-cache
options.description: Do not update the cache in vendor/cache with the newly bundled gems.

options.name: --quiet
options.description: Only output warnings and errors.

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update your gems to the latest available versions

options.name: --all
options.description: Update all gems specified in Gemfile.

options.name: --group
options.description: Update a specific group of gems.

options.name: --source
options.description: The name of a :git or :path source used in the Gemfile.

options.name: --local
options.description: Do not attempt to fetch gems remotely and use the gem cache instead.

options.name: --ruby
options.description: Update ruby declaration in Gemfile.lock.

options.name: --bundler
options.description: Update the locked version of bundler to the invoked bundler version.

subcommands.name: exec
subcommands.description: Execute a command in the context of the bundle

options.name: --keep-file-descriptors
options.description: Exec in Ruby 2.0 began discarding non-standard file descriptors.

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add gem to the Gemfile and run bundle install

args.name: GEM
args.description: Name of the gem to add

options.name: --version
options.description: Specify version requirements.

options.name: --group
options.description: Specify a group.

options.name: --source
options.description: Specify a source.

options.name: --skip-install
options.description: Adds the gem to the Gemfile but does not install it.

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Removes a gem from the Gemfile

args.name: GEM
args.description: Name of the gem to remove

options.name: --install
options.description: Run bundle install after removing them.

subcommands.name: outdated
subcommands.description: List installed gems with newer versions available

options.name: --local
options.description: Do not attempt to fetch gems remotely and use the gem cache instead.

options.name: --pre
options.description: Check for newer pre-release gems.

options.name: --source
options.description: Check against a specific source.

options.name: --strict
options.description: Only list newer versions allowed by your Gemfile requirements.

options.name: --groups
options.description: List gems by group.

subcommands.name: info
subcommands.description: Show information for the given gem

options.name: --path
options.description: Print the path of the given gem

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Generates a Gemfile into the current working directory

options.name: --gemspec
options.description: Use the specified .gemspec to create the Gemfile

globalOptions.name: --retry
globalOptions.description: Specify the number of times you wish to attempt network commands
